title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
